description: The ``Local Transform`` node outputs the position, rotation and scale of the input slot in local coordinate space, i.e. the slot's transform relative to its parent slot.

fields.* ([[Slot]]): The slot whose local transform is output.
fields.Position: The local position of the provided * (Slot).
fields.Rotation: The local rotation of the provided * (Slot).
fields.Scale: The local scale of the provided * (Slot).
